full_text:
THE HIVE HERALD — #54 (2026-06-06)

PULSE
Health: 0.5632 (C). 1039 wallets, 298 contributors. 50 memos today vs 107 avg. Velocity dropping.

FLOW
45 reward payments, 233699 PFT distributed to 17 contributors. Top earner: rhwiJx...2TaE (48000 PFT).

AIRDROPS
1 daily airdrops issued yesterday totaling 1,200 PFT. Highest: rsS2Y6...aXRZ (1,200 PFT). 7-day leader: r4ahFv...5XyU (20,900 PFT, avg 3,483/day over 6 days).

MOVERS
Most active (7d): rhwiJx...2TaE (60 memos). Fastest new contributor: rsyYs6...xKjq (6.0 memos/day in 1 days). 17 new wallet(s) this week. 59 contributor(s) went quiet (7+ days silent).

WATCH
769 sybil accounts tracked across 6 cluster(s). Bot ratio: 70.5%. 1 wallet(s) in review queue. Enforcement: active. Zero reward leaks.

DEEP CUT
30 days ago (2026-05-07): 213 transactions from 31 wallets. Busiest hour ever: 2026-03-02T19:00 UTC (183 memos). First indexed transaction: 2026-02-06 from r4vhrM...7bmA

— pft.permanentupperclass.com/herald/
